---
title: "ETL and Data Transformation Systems Review"
subtitle: "Extraction, Staging, Mapping, Quality Gates, CDC, Merge Logic, Lineage, and Governance"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Transformation objective

Define sources, target grain, canonical entities, business rules, and governance owner.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
import hashlib

def stable_key(value):
    return hashlib.sha256(value.lower().encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()[:16]

print({"canonical_customer_id": stable_key("ada@example.com")})
```

## Quality gates

Review mapping coverage, null constraints, referential integrity, rejected records, and idempotent merge behavior.

## Lineage

Preserve run ID, source batch, input fingerprints, code version, rejected-record counts, and output table state.

## Appendix

Attach raw extracts, mappings, CDC events, orchestration runs, tests, and generated summaries.
